name: RedDoorz Syariah @ Sumur Tiga Beach Sabang Aceh

reviews.reviewTitle: Tempat agak usang tapi view Superb!
reviews.reviewComments: Mungkin boleh dibaiki semula tempatnya.  lokasi sangat bagus. kamar seaview. Semoga terus maju.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel yg bagus dengan harga yg murah akses ke mana" dekat dan ada akses turun ke pantai bawah. Sangat recoment
reviews.reviewComments: A nice hotel with cheap prices, accessible to everywhere and has access to the beach below. Highly recommended.

reviews.originalComment:
Dari kamar bersebrangan dengan pemandangan laut, indah banget
Kamar nya juga bersih dan rapi. Ada fasilitas ac juga
reviews.reviewComments: From the room across with a view of the sea, it's really beautiful. The room is also clean and tidy. There is air conditioning as well.

reviews.originalComment:
Sesuailah.. dengan fasilitas nya, lumayan murah dan trjangkau, tapi agak lumayan jauh dr kota..
Yg malas kluar bisa pesan makan dsini..
reviews.reviewComments: It's quite affordable and accessible with its facilities, but it's a bit far from the city. For those who are lazy to go out, you can order food here.

reviews.reviewTitle: the view and the people there was amazing
reviews.reviewComments:
my friend and I last minute plan come to aceh for watersport. so we came across this hotel.. we are both hotelier.. we were impressed by the people there.. we left our phone charger at the city and had to trouble the guy to borrow.. but apparently my phone doesn't compatible with few charger... but he was genuinely helpful till we manage to charges the phone the whole day. everyone there was helpful and nice..

the price was cheap.. the food was great.. we will definitely comeback to indonesia again. 

I think if the hotel have fund they can improve on the garden landscape and refurbish the infrastructure and they have high chances to be 1 of the best in sabang..

Kamar nya juga bersih dan rapi. Ada fasilitas ac juga

reviews.reviewTitle: the view and the people there was amazing
reviews.reviewComments:
my friend and I last minute plan come to aceh for watersport. so we came across this hotel.. we are both hotelier.. we were impressed by the people there.. we left our phone charger at the city and had to trouble the guy to borrow.. but apparently my phone doesn't compatible with few charger... but he was genuinely helpful till we manage to charges the phone the whole day. everyone there was helpful and nice..

the price was cheap.. the food was great.. we will definitely comeback to indonesia again. 

I think if the hotel have fund they can improve on the garden landscape and refurbish the infrastructure and they have high chances to be 1 of the best in sabang..

This is not a 3-star location
2 star at best, and only because the management on site was very helpful at addressing some of my issues.

Not really on the beach, but there is access after going down some steep rocky stairs and then a climb over some rocks.

The rooms, and bathrooms in particular, are very run down. Soap and mineral deposits caked the bathroom tiles and mirrors. Wifi issues constantly. No hot water or flushing toilets. And there are no wardrobe closets or televisions as indicated on booking app photos.  Beds were decent and clean. Pictures on app must have been from many, many years ago. I would add my own photos but the app won't let me.

Kitchen staff were rude to me and talked about me behind my back. Only ate here once due to the lack of vegetarian options, and that meal had me on the toilet for days afterwards.

Nice sea view if you book an upper level room. However, no insulation between  rooms so expect to hear your neighbors very easily.

Reddoorz seems to have stopped investing in their properties long ago. Similar experience with shoddy rooms at other reddoorz locations. Will not stay with Reddorz ever again.

MUCH better values to be had within the area.
I booked on the day of my staying. Very comfortable and clean bed and mattress but there were no hot water or heater. I should comment the staff helped me arrange transportation to zero km

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman tapi kurang bersih dan yang ditampilkan di aplikasi beda dengan yg dikamarnya. Tapi cafe dibawah, makanannya enak
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable but not very clean, and what is shown in the application is different from what is in the room. But the cafe below has delicious food.

For Budget yess good to stay
For healing environment really nice.
Only toilet not nice..i stay 4days for room c3 really no have connections wifi the view from window not nice..i change to room b3 the view really nice...
Sorry. Not a safe place to stay.  The place needs major repairs. Stairs are slippery and need anti slip material on them.

reviews.originalComment: Untuk view lumayan ok, tp untuk kamar seperti tidak dirawat... Banyak yg rusak & kotor. Terutama dikamar mandi sangat kotor & kebersihan tidak dijaga
reviews.reviewComments: The view is quite okay, but the room seems poorly maintained... Many things are broken and dirty. Especially in the bathroom, it is very dirty and cleanliness is not maintained.
staff jarang ada di pejabat.
Kurang bersih, dan staff jarang ada di pejabat
Bilik agak panas, aircond buka tapi masih panas, bilik air terlalu kotor.
Perfect for family vacation
Just average ..u got what u pay
Not a place to stay
Tempat yang layak untuk berdua
Penginapan yang sesuai untuk ketenangan

I booked the best and most expensive room but I couldn’t even stay there and moved out in 1 hour - everything was old, stained, dirty, moldy, half-broken. I’ve taken pictures and videos as proof. 
Absolutely disgusting! This place must be removed from Agoda!

Kamar lebar
dekat pantai
AC dingin
staff ramah
Aircon not functioning well and the water so dirty

reviews.reviewTitle: Just take a rag and wipe stuff down!
reviews.reviewComments: Not as depicted in photos at all, very run down and filthy bathrooms.  How difficult is it to take a rag and detergent and wipe stuff clean? Really a pity because it is in a beautiful location.
Just say PERFECTO
U can't use the closet because the water can't be used to flash the closet.air cond is not working properly..keep turn off n have to turn it on. So annoying, can't sleep because of that disturbance
Ac dingin, kamar nyaman, Pantai tinggal turun aja
Close to the city and not really crowded, perfect for staycation.

for cleaning services at this hotel is very good, the place is very comfortable, the restaurant food is very good and the price is very affordable. Access to the hotel is very easy to reach. Not far from the city center

Pros
The price offered is extremely affordable. It took around 5 minutes to travel from hotel to Sabang town. The staff is friendly and really helpful. 

Cons
The room's toilet cleanliness is quite average but can be improved and need to improve on facilities such as hotel lobby and reopen the restaurant.
The toilet sooooo dirty!!! aircond not function well.. too many mosquito.. TV not function. WIFI not in the room.. not recommend this hotel at all
My staying experience was terrible. toilet too dirty.. so many mosquito inside the room. TV not function. aircond also not cool. im more concern on the cleanliness. the toilet like hell!!

reviews.reviewTitle: Allez ailleurs sauf pour une nuit
reviews.reviewPositives: La vue et l’emplacement mais rien d’autre
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Hôtel vraiment à l’abandon (tapisserie arrachée, douche qui fuit de partout: du coup c’est douche au seau, fuîtes d’eau de partout dans la salle de bain, fourmis, odeur nauséabonde dans la salle de bain etc)
Bien que les personnes soient gentilles personne ne parle anglais et on nous a couru après jusqu’à 22h tous les soirs pour payer la chambre. Le prix a augmenté chaque jour alors que le camp était au 3/4 vide enfin bref nous nous sommes dit que les commentaires ne reflètent pas du tout l’état déplorable de l’endroit. 

Les seuls + sont la vue et l’accès à la plage.

reviews.reviewTitle: Not So clean . Room Just find for over night
reviews.reviewComments: Not Really recommended for traveller who want to relax at the hotel. Room not clean. However, staff very cooperative and helpful. The booking was not link between agoda and reddoorz System . They dont have record for our booking and even taking long time to confirm on the payment . For those booking this hotel via agoda Better you go for check in first rather check in late.

reviews.reviewTitle: Nous serions partions si il y avait de la place autre part
reviews.reviewPositives: Établissement très vétuste, aucune photo ne corresponds à la réalité
reviews.reviewNegatives: Rien de bon sauf le matelas

reviews.originalComment: Kurang bersih. Alat mandi ada yg rusak, tidak diperbaiki.
reviews.reviewComments: Not clean enough. The bath equipment is damaged and not repaired.

reviews.originalComment: Mantap sih kekuranganya gak ada TV dan lemari aja yg lain udah keren banget
reviews.reviewComments: It's great, the only downside is that there's no TV and just a wardrobe; everything else is really cool.
Suitable for those who need tranquility.
Pemandangan kamar langsung ke pantai. Kamar bersih dan staff ramah. Bakal balik lagi 👌

reviews.reviewNegatives: Es könnte eine schöne Anlage sein. Leider war der Bungalow komplett verrumpelt. Im Bad kein Spiegel, die Toilettenspülung ging nicht, der WC Stein hat gestunken. Wir waren nur eine Nacht zur Überbrückung.

reviews.reviewComments: The location and atmosphere are comfortable.

reviews.originalComment: Sudah jadi langganan setiap trip ke sabang dan selalu bermalam disini, suasana nyaman dan sangat cocok untuk berlibur dan berwisata.
reviews.reviewComments: I have become a regular on every trip to Sabang and always stay here; the atmosphere is comfortable and very suitable for vacationing and sightseeing.

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya cukup bagus dan nyaman. kamar mandinya bersih, ac nya dingin. namun perlu ditingkatkan lagi kebersihannya pada beberapa item misal pada kolong tempat tidur dan kaca di kamar mandi. harganya juga murah dan pemandangannya bagus langsung berhadapan dengan pantai.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is quite nice and comfortable. The bathroom is clean, and the air conditioning is cold. However, cleanliness needs to be improved on some items, such as under the bed and the mirror in the bathroom. The price is also affordable, and the view is nice, directly facing the beach.

reviews.originalComment:
Utk hrga sih Ok banget, ada AC nya..
Kasur, bantal dan selimut ny lembut banget. Enak untuk istirahat deh..
Saran sih, alangkah baik nya kamar mandi nya d bersihkan karena bnyk kerak2 gtu.. bersih sih bersih, cmn ada kerak2 d ember, d kran nya biar lbh enak d pandang.. hihi
So far bagus semua.. Tp kl tidur d bagian atas itu kan kayu yah, jd kl siang panas.. buka AC jg kagak mempan.. hihi.. kl malam uda dingin sih..
Jd pengen k sabang lagi
Oh ya, d sni ada akses utk turun k pantai nya yah.. jd bs main pasir dan air..
reviews.reviewComments: For the price, it's really great, there’s AC.. The mattress, pillows, and blankets are very soft. It's nice for resting.. My suggestion is it would be better if the bathroom is cleaned because there are a lot of stains.. It is clean, but there are stains in the bucket and the faucet to make it more pleasing to the eye.. hehehe So far everything is good.. But sleeping in the upper part is wood, so it gets hot during the day.. even with the AC on it doesn’t help.. hehehe At night it gets cold though.. Makes me want to go to Sabang again Oh yes, there’s access to go down to the beach here.. so you can play sand and water..

reviews.originalComment:
Untuk harga sih termasuk murah ya, karena ada AC. Tapi setelah plng dr sni, badan saya merah dan gatal2. Setelah cek dokter, kt dokter di gigit serangga. 😂
Gak di sarani tidur d kamar bawah, karena kl d atas ada orang yg jalan atau berbicara otomatis terdengar sampe kamar, krn atasnya asbes. Jadi kedengaran banget..
Untuk lokasi nya lumayan jauh dari kota, cuman kl ada sewa motor yah tinggal naik motor aja.. trs d hotel ni ada akses utk turun k pantai, jd bs mandi2..
reviews.reviewComments:
The price is quite cheap because there is air conditioning. But after returning from there, my body turned red and itchy. After checking with the doctor, the doctor said it was an insect bite. 😂 
They do not recommend sleeping in the downstairs room, because if there are people walking or talking upstairs, it automatically sounds all the way to the room, because the ceiling is asbestos. So it’s really loud..
The location is pretty far from the city, but if you rent a motorcycle, you can just ride the motorcycle. Also, in this hotel, there is access to go down to the beach, so you can swim.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman dan tenang ada tempat makan dan dekat pantai❤️❤️
reviews.reviewComments: The place is comfortable and peaceful, there is a dining area and it is close to the beach❤️❤️

reviews.reviewPositives: Er was een goede airco en je zat dicht tegen het strand.
reviews.reviewNegatives: De kamers waren heel vies met schimmel en gaten in de muur. Verder was er geen wifi in de kamer en kon het personeel geen engels. Ik zou het verblijf niet aanraden, zeker niet voor een lange periode. Voor 1 nacht kan het nog wel als goedkoop alternatief.

reviews.reviewComments: Zum Beispiel Restaurant billig aber nicht schmackhaft

reviews.reviewPositives: Tempatnya cukup bersih, nyaman juga. Ada balkon + langsung mengatah ke laut.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Ac nya tidak dingin, karna lantainya dari papan jadi kalau jalan sedikit berisik + bangunannya butuh renovasi.

reviews.reviewComments:
Lage gut aber keine Instandhaltung.
Alles defekt und unsauber
Stayed 4 days 3 nights. Fasilitas sesuai harga.
untuk staff nya ramah, kebersihan kamar juga oke, dan letaknya juga dekat kemana mana, terbaiklah

Sukaa sih nginep disini. Dengan harga yang terjangkau ditambah dengan lokasinya Deket banget sama pantai sumur tiga. 
Untuk kamarnya standar, sama kaya yang di foto. Hanya aja mungkin agak kurang perawatan ya. Kamar mandinya bersih sebenernya cuma mungkin karna ada noda yang gak bisa dibersihkan jadi terkesan nya kotor, tapi bersih sebenarnya. Airnya juga kencang untuk mandi.

Broken shower
Hot air conditioner
Fasilitas bagus dan sangat memuaskan.
Mantap
lokasi dipinggir pantai tpi deket ke kota sabang nya. worth it bangetttt pokonyaa
Liburan Keluarga
Biasa saja
Oke
Selalu puas
Very dirty, unrecommended for sleep here.
Mantap
Snagat memuaskam
Sangat nyaman

reviews.reviewPositives: Lokalita pěkná,  pláž s barem vedlejšího ubytování.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Obrázky neodpovídají realitě.  Nafoceno před 20 lety bez jakékoliv údržby. Sprcha tekla částečně,  v koupelně se záchodem nešlo splachování,  byla tam plíseň. Klimatizace běžela z 1/3. První dojem byl, že ihned odjedeme. Požádali jsme o jiné pokoje, ale personál dělal mrtvého brouka.

reviews.reviewComments: Nyaman

reviews.reviewTitle: Need to immediately refurbish the facilities
reviews.reviewNegatives:
The facilities in poor condition 
1. TV not functioning 
2. Toilet bowl damaged 
3. Shower not functioning 
4. Towel holder broken 
5. Toilet door broken

reviews.reviewComments: Mantap,view nya pas

Stafnya sgt tdk profesional. Barang tamu yg ketinggalan, dibawa pulang ke rmh dgn alasan keamanan (berarti hotelnya segitu gak amannya y? ) . Trs nawarkan utk mengantar brg ny ke pelabuhan (dgn biaya tambahan 100rb). Tp  tamunya mau ambil brg yg tertinggal tsb ke hotel,  dimintai uang 50rb dgn alasan ongkos utk ambil ke rmh staf hotelnya. Baru x ni nginap di hotel trs brg ketinggalan, hrs bayar lg. Btw brg yg ketinggalan cm kabel charger lho, sampe hrs dibawa ke rmh ya. Lawak g sh? Segitunya yg nyari uang tambahan itu. Sangat kecewa pokoknya dan gk akan mau nginap di sana lg 👎

reviews.reviewNegatives:
toilet flush not working
Shower not working
No hot water
No tissue provided
Overall equipment not really good

reviews.reviewComments: Cocok uhtuk pasangan yang baru menikah, dan orang yang membutuhkan ketenangan dalam bekerja

reviews.reviewTitle: The worst stay in my entire holiday.
reviews.reviewNegatives: When enter the room, it is not as described on booking.com. Sandy room floor, uncomfortable pillows, television not functioning and even wifi not available in the room. The worst part is the dirty bathroom and water dripping from the bathroom ceiling above. I can also hear the movement from upstair room. The room balcony also dirty and not well maintained.

reviews.reviewComments: Semua2nya sudah mantap,hanya saja banyak semut di dlm kamar.tp sudah minta di basmi..ya tetap saja masih ada.pd hal view nya laut best x
Bagian stafnya lebih baik ramah dengan usia berapapun
Semuanya oke, kamar mandi ,toilet yg  masih kotor  . Klo adactamu di lantai atas lantai bawah , terganggu krn  lantai tas dari kayu semua.  Tapi vire nya spektakuler
Cocok utk berhemat...
Saran saya kalau mau memilih penginapan jangan terpegaruh dengan foto2 di webset,sering nya foto2 kamar atau ruangan tdk sesuai ekpetasi.
Indah pemandangan view laut
Lokasinya dekat dgn pinggir laut

Hotelnya tidak sprti yg ada difoto, menyeramkan,mulai dari kamar nya yg harus naik ke lantai 2,kayu2 nya sdh  kropos padahal kami bawa org tua dan anak2, ada kotoran eek kucing dikamar, kok bisa ya,,, untungnya bs pindah kamar,kamar mandi kotor, lantai kamar nya berdecit2 kyk mo roboh,balkon kayunya jg sgt tidak aman, sdh kropos dan mo roboh jg,tidak ada pantai,cuma pemandangan laut aja,kecewa nginap dsni,sgt tidak direkomendasikan untuk klrga yg membawa orang tua dan anak kecil
Over all lumayanlah utk harga segitu, cuman salah satu kamar diantara 3 kamar yg kita pesan ac nya ada yg bocor
Viewnya bagus bangettt.. bs dapet sunrise
Dibutuhkan perawatan pada kamar agar tidak usang
Jadi pingin balik lagi
Pelayanan bagus
Tempatnya nyaman dan indah. Langsung dapat melihat sunrise di pagi hari....

reviews.reviewTitle: Best budget hotel in sumur tiga
reviews.reviewComments: Kamar AC, kasur dan bantal empuk, ada beranda menghadap pantai, ada wifi di lobby, yang paling penting paling budget friendly. View dari kamar biasa aja sebenernya. Tapi coba turun ke tangga pantai. Itu best view sih di antara hotel lain di sumur tiga. Sarapan di sana jg murah. Kalo mau ke freddies, juga deket. Buat nongkrong dan makan2 aja. Tapi minusnya kamar mandinya licin. Tolong dikosek misal 1- 2 minggu sekali pake pembersih kerak. Soalnya bahaya bgt kalo tamu g hati2. Staff sangat baik

Bagus,murah
Rekomendes

Tidak sesuai dengan ekspetasi seperti kunjungan pertama ...... dimana ac terlalu berisik.... sabun dan sikat gigi tidak.... tv tidak berfungsi.... shower tidak berfungsi..... sangat mengecewakan.... next time saya pilih hotel lain jika berkunjung ke sabang
Recomended nginap disini,,
sangat bagus, semoga bisa liburan dan nginap disana
Lokasi nyaman untuk istirahat, hanya akses transportasi umum agak sulit, tetapi staff siap membanu (Bustami)
Tempatnya nyaman, hanya saja agak sulit akses transportasi umum, tetapi staff siap mmbantu.

Penginapan yang sesuai hrga y
Staffnya ramah
Kamar lumayan bersih
View oke
Mengerikan kalau oenakut ga usah kesini
Beberapa kamar tidak bisa mengakses wiffi atau sinyal telefon

reviews.reviewTitle: enjoy the ocean view from an isolated location
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel's rates are reasonable. Every room has a beautiful view of the ocean. It takes roughly 8 minutes to ride from the jetty to the hotel. The staff is friendly and helpful, and the wifi service is adequate. The hotels appear to be old and might benefit from upgrades to amenities such as restrooms and air conditioning.
